articles.title: US-sanctioned tanker carrying fist shipment of Iranian oil to India since 2019 gets rerouted to China
articles.description: The rerouting of the Ping Shun tanker to China may be due to payment issues, as Iran tightens terms for crude sales. The vessel, initially headed to India, is now signaling China as its destination amidst US sanctions and a temporary waiver for Iranian oil sales.

articles.title: Where waste accumulates and river Adyar ‘weeps’
articles.description: Two Chennai residents find themselves carrying out a cleanliness audit of a 400-metre riverside in Gandhinagar, Adyar. A WRD official notes that the waste on this river trail could be the result of back flow

articles.title: T.N. Assembly poll | BJP candidate list out; Union Minister of State L. Murugan to contest from Avanashi
articles.description: Former BJP State president K. Annamalai was not given a ticket; Nainar Nagenthran to contest from Sattur, Tamilisai Soundararajan from Mylapore

articles.title: North Korea Reportedly Razes Towns Near Key Space Test Site
articles.description: North Korea appears to have razed towns near one of the country’s key missile and satellite testing stations in a sign of possible expansion plans, adding to security concerns in a region already facing uncertainties as the war in Iran drags on.

dailyNews.description: Democrats face a defining intra-party battle between progressives and moderates that could determine their 2028 presidential chances and viability.

dailyNews.title: What B-52 bombers bring to Iran fight — and what it means for the war now
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is now flying B-52 bombers over Iran, a dramatic operational shift signaling air superiority after weeks of strikes degraded its defenses.

dailyNews.description: Unauthorized drone incursions over Barksdale Air Force Base and Fort McNair signal a national security failure, as fragmented policy leaves military bases dangerously exposed.

dailyNews.description: Colorado Democrats advance a bill creating civil lawsuit pathways against conversion therapy providers just days after the Supreme Court blocked the ban.

dailyNews.description: The Artemis II crew launched from Kennedy Space Center aboard Orion, embarking on NASA's first crewed moon mission since the Apollo era of the 1970s.

dailyNews.description: From Iran to China, President Trump’s global aggression has encouraged other countries to search for new ways to pressure the U.S. economy.

dailyNews.title: The Awe of a Moon Launch in an Age of Trump, Turmoil and Tribal Divisions
dailyNews.description: The launch of Artemis II captured the tenor of the times in a country that can still do big things but seems forever mired in big problems.

dailyNews.title: Planning Commission Approves Trump’s Ballroom, but Legal Roadblocks Remain
dailyNews.description: The board had been expected to vote to approve the project last month, but it was delayed after about 32,000 mostly negative comments rolled in from across the country.

dailyNews.title: What to Know About the ‘Massive’ Military Bunker Beneath Trump’s Ballroom
dailyNews.description: President Trump has been talking about the emergency facility beneath what was once the East Wing, details of which are usually kept secret, as he tries to justify his renovation.

dailyNews.title: Late Night Says Goodbye to Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump is “on a bit of a firing spree,” Jimmy Fallon said on “The Tonight Show” on Thursday, adding, “Ironically, the only staffer who has immunity is RFK Jr.”

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran"
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran," and previewed that strikes on bridges and power plants could be next.

dailyNews.title: Cuba says it released over 2,000 prisoners as White House heaps pressure on island
dailyNews.description: The Cuban government says it has pardoned and released 2,010 prisoners, a sweeping move that comes as the island nation grapples with pressure from the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi: Here's what we know
dailyNews.description: President Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi on Thursday after months of his waning support. CBS News covers the lead-up, her acting replacement and what this means.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department employee who was prosecuted over Jan. 6 Capitol attack resigns
dailyNews.description: A former FBI agent who was prosecuted for his alleged role in the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol and later hired by the Trump-era Justice Department has left his government post, he announced Thursday.

dailyNews.description: President Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi; Artemis II gets green light for translunar injection burn.

dailyNews.description: One of the sources said Hegseth wants someone in the role who will implement President Trump and Hegseth's vision for the Army.
